title: ligularia angusta
intro: Ligularia angusta, also known as the narrow-leaved leopard plant or Chinese dragon flower, is a perennial plant native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Ligularia angusta include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. Ligularia angusta can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
